prompt: Compare average monthly revenue between store regions for 2022 and 2023
Retriever_1_message:
I executed this query to retrieve the required data:

'''SQL
SELECT
    st.region,
    CASE
        WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM sl.month) = 2022 THEN '2022'
        WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM sl.month) = 2023 THEN '2023'
    END AS year,
    ROUND(AVG(sl.monthly_rev), 2) AS avg_monthly_revenue
FROM (
    SELECT
        Store_Number,
        DATE_TRUNC('month', Sold_Date) AS month,
        SUM(Total_Sale_Value) AS monthly_rev
    FROM sales
    WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM Sold_Date) IN (2022, 2023)
    GROUP BY Store_Number, DATE_TRUNC('month', Sold_Date)
) sl
JOIN stores st ON sl.Store_Number = st.Store_Number
GROUP BY st.region, CASE
        WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM sl.month) = 2022 THEN '2022'
        WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM sl.month) = 2023 THEN '2023'
    END
ORDER BY st.region, year
'''

The resulting DataFrame has 8 rows with columns : region, year, avg_monthly_revenue
